Name: Search
Effect: Opens a search bar that allows you to search for a certain file name; to search the document for keywords, use the magnifying glass on the left task bar.

Name: Select Line
Effect: Highlights the entire line that your cursor is currently on.

Name: Shuffle
Effect: Hold CONTROL, tap TAB: Opens a dropdown list of open tabs, and tapping tab again will highlight the next tab. The highlighted tab will be opened when the keys are released.

Name: Copy Line
Effect: Duplicates the line of code your cursor rests on directly below the original line.

Name: Select
Effect: After selecting text, when you use this command it will highlight further instances of the same text - which you can use to change them all at once.

Name: Move Line
Effect: Moves selected code line(s) up or down, highlight the lines or rest your cursor on a single line.

Name: Side Bar
Effect: Toggles the Explorer tab visibility, which displays the file structure of the open project.

Name: New Line
Effect: With your cursor placed anywhere on a line of code, this will create an empty line beneath the original and place your cursor at the beginning of the new line.

Name: Comment
Effect: Comments out code, or comment on.
